content: agent1: working on normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (refactor image_to_base64). Will touch types.py only.

agent1: only my normalize_image_bytes change is currently in types.py (git diff shows just that). I own image_to_base64's base64-encoding + calling normalize_image_bytes(self.image) -> (encoded, decoded_for_guessing); mimetype guess now uses filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing). If you add get_image_mimetype(), please layer it on top of this (e.g. wrap the filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing) call) rather than reverting my encoding change. Let me know once you've applied your edit so I can re-check.
